meta.title: Linguist – Privacy-Focused Browser Translator Extension
meta.description: Privacy-focused browser translator extension for Chrome and Firefox. Translate web pages, highlighted text and subtitles instantly with offline support.

hero.title: Translate everything in your browser.
hero.description:
Linguist is a browser translator extension that helps you translate anything instantly.

Translate full web pages, highlighted text, Netflix subtitles, and private messages. Speak translated text and save important translations to your personal dictionary to learn new words even offline.

Linguist is a modern, privacy-focused alternative to Google Translate extensions. Try it for free.

opensource.title: Open source
opensource.content:
Linguist is a completely free and <0>open-source</0> browser translation extension. It does not collect or sell any user data.

You may <1>donate</1> to support Linguist and help us maintain independence and high quality.

Share Linguist on social media and spread the word to help make it popular.

support.title: Support
support.content:
If you have any questions, contact us <0/>.
If you found a bug and have a GitHub account — <1>create an issue</1>.

offlineTranslation.title: Offline translation and privacy
offlineTranslation.content:
Translate text directly on your device without sending private messages over the internet using the built-in offline translator.

Simply enable the feature on the options page to keep your translations private when working with emails, documents, or personal messages.

With the offline translator you can translate pages even without an internet connection, which is especially useful while traveling.

fullPageTranslation.title: Full page translation
fullPageTranslation.content:
Fast and high-quality full-page translation in just a few clicks.

Use a hotkey to translate instantly. Hover over translated text to see the original. Translate even private pages behind login forms or paywalls.

Set up automatic translation rules based on page language or domain.

selectedTextTranslation.title: Translation for selected text
selectedTextTranslation.content:
Encounter unfamiliar words while reading an online article?
Just select the text on the page and click the translate button.

You can listen to the translated and original text and save the translation to your dictionary to revisit it later.

textTranslation.title: Text translation always at hand
textTranslation.content:
Need to translate something quickly? Just click the Linguist button and enter your text.

No more switching between tabs with translation websites — translate directly in your browser using Linguist and the service you prefer.

knowledgeBase.title: Build your own personal knowledge base
knowledgeBase.content:
Every translated text is saved in history, and you can add favorite translations to your personal dictionary. Search through your dictionary and translation history anytime.

Nothing is lost even during extensive research or learning sessions.

The dictionary works offline, making Linguist perfect for language learners and travelers who need constant access to their word lists.

customTranslators.title: Custom translators
customTranslators.content:
With Linguist you control which translation service to use.

Linguist supports popular translation providers such as Google, Yandex, Microsoft, and others.

If a service is missing, you can add it as a <0>custom translator</0>.

Custom translators allow you to integrate any translation system — from new LLM services like ChatGPT to local translators running on your device such as Ollama or LibreTranslate.

whatIsLinguist.title: What is Linguist?
whatIsLinguist.content:
Linguist is a privacy‑focused browser translator extension for Chrome and Firefox.

It allows you to translate full web pages, highlighted text, subtitles, and messages directly in your browser without switching to external translation websites.

whyLinguist.title: Why should I use Linguist?
whyLinguist.content:
There are many browser extensions for translating web pages, and some browsers even include built‑in translators. So why try Linguist?

Most built‑in translators and browser translation extensions are limited in flexibility. In many cases they rely on a single translation service such as Google Translate or Microsoft Bing, while Firefox provides its own offline translator. This means you usually cannot choose the service that best fits your needs.

If the translation quality is not good enough for your use case, or if sending private text to third‑party services is unacceptable, most translation tools leave you with no real alternative.

Many tools also focus on only one task. Some translate full pages, while others translate only selected text.

At the same time, a growing number of translation extensions are built primarily around monetization. Basic features such as translation history or personal dictionaries may be locked behind subscriptions, and in some cases even basic things like a dark theme are treated as premium features. Over time, tools designed to solve a simple problem can become unnecessarily complicated.

Linguist takes a different approach. It is designed first as a practical translation tool. You can choose the translation service that works best for you, switch between providers, or add your own custom translators.

Linguist also brings everything together in one place: translate entire web pages, highlighted text, subtitles, and messages, while keeping track of important translations in your history and personal dictionary.

theLinguistLogo.title: Why the Linguist logo is the Tower of Babel
theLinguistLogo.content:
The Linguist logo is inspired by the <wiki>Tower of Babel</wiki> — one of the oldest stories about language and communication.

According to the story, people once spoke the same language and tried to build a tower reaching the sky. The tower was never finished, and humanity was scattered across many languages. Since then, language differences have often made communication harder.

Linguist was created to solve exactly this problem.

The Tower of Babel in the logo is a small reminder of that story: many languages, many cultures, and the constant human effort to understand each other. Linguist helps bridge those gaps by making translation simple, flexible, and accessible directly in your browser.

The logo also reflects the spirit of the project. Linguist is not just another wrapper over "Google Translate" — it has personality. It is built by people who care about languages, privacy, and open technology. The Tower of Babel represents curiosity, learning, and the idea that language differences should bring people together rather than keep them apart.

howTranslatePages.title: How does Linguist translate web pages?
howTranslatePages.content:
Linguist can translate entire web pages in just a few clicks. You can trigger page translation using the extension button or a hotkey.

The original text remains accessible, and you can view it by hovering over the translated content.

offlineTranslation.title: Can Linguist translate pages offline?
offlineTranslation.content:
Yes. Linguist includes a built‑in offline translator that allows you to translate text without sending your data over the internet.

This is useful for maintaining privacy and for translating content when you have no internet connection.

privacy.title: Is Linguist private?
privacy.content:
Yes. Linguist is designed with privacy in mind.

The extension does not collect or sell user data. When using the <OfflineTranslator>offline translator</OfflineTranslator>, your translations stay entirely on your device.

supportedBrowsers.title: What browsers does Linguist support?
supportedBrowsers.content:
Linguist is available for Chrome and Firefox. It also works in other Chromium‑based browsers that support Chrome extensions.

Linguist support the Android browsers, so you can use it in mobile Firefox and Chromium browsers.

selectedText.title: Can Linguist translate selected text?
selectedText.content:
Yes. Simply highlight any text on a web page and use the translation button to translate it instantly.

You can also listen to the translated text and save it to your personal dictionary.

customTranslators.title: Can I use my own translation service?
customTranslators.content:
Yes. Linguist supports <custom-translator>custom translators</custom-translator>, allowing you to integrate additional translation services.

You can connect external APIs or even local translation systems such as <libre-translate>LibreTranslate</libre-translate> or <ollama>Ollama</ollama>.

isFree.title: Is Linguist free?
isFree.content:
Yes. Linguist is completely free and <linguist>open source</linguist>.

The project is supported by the community, and you can optionally <donations>contribute through donations</donations>.
